item.title: Transperineal contrast-enhanced ultrasound: a rapid and reliable tool for differentiating abscesses from inflammatory masses in perianal Crohn's disease.
item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - Perianal abscesses are serious complications of Crohn's disease (CD) requiring timely and accurate diagnosis. Contrast-enhanced ultrasound (CEUS), which in abdominal intestinal ultrasound (IUS) has...
